booth: Eastman Machine Company is a fifth-generation, American cutting machine manufacturer located in Buffalo, NY. Eastman offers the industry’s widest range of classic, hand-held and manually-operated fabric cutting machines; as well as a comprehensive line of fully automated, computerized cutting and plotting systems. Eastman is committed to manufacturing solutions proven to be simpler to operate, less expensive to maintain, and customized specific to cutting and handling the most diverse range of traditional, modern, and industrial fabrics in the market today. Manufactured with the highest quality materials, built to precise specifications, and subject to rigorous testing, Eastman’s line of cutting systems has been setting the standard for over a century.  T25 to see precision cutting in action!
